answers: Kubernetes (K8s) = container orchestration platform. Automates deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications.
K8s concepts: Pods (smallest unit), Deployments (manage replicas), Services (networking), and ConfigMaps (configuration).
Benefits: auto-scaling, self-healing (restarts failed containers), rolling updates, and load balancing built-in.
Start learning K8s: install Minikube locally, deploy a simple app, learn kubectl commands, then explore Helm charts.

feelings.question: Tell me about kubernetes
feelings.answer:

Hope this helps!
